programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Caddyshack 2
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon vows revenge when his membership in a luxurious club is rejected So he strikes back by buying the club and turning it into an amusement park

programme.title: The Fugitive S3 E10
programme.desc: Stranded in an abandoned town and awaiting help the blind Mrs Gerard Barbara Rush realizes she is with Kimble David Janssen With her husband on the way she delays Kimbles departure hoping his capture will end her husbands obsession and save her marriage

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A female diving friend of Mikes is hospitalized with severe injuries sustained by a hit-and-run speedboat piloted by a popular movie star

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is recruited to rescue the statue of a Saint who falls off a ship into the sea The locals believe this is the cause of many problems in the area including the poor fishing

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A very young corporal with a great gunnery training record is anxious to prove himself but freezes up during actual combat

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Determined to prove everyone wrong David decides to sneak into the basement of the old house where Barnabas keeps his coffin

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: David is so adamant there is a coffin in the basement of the old house that Burke and Dr Woodard decide to visit Barnabas and investigate

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Since they failed to find anything suspicious in the basement of the old house David tells Burke and Dr Woodard about the secret room in the mausoleum

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: A psychiatrist analyzes David Elizabeth informs Burke that theres a clause in an old family will which prevents her from selling him the house Dr Woodard decides to take another look at the mausoleum

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Crypt 306
programme.desc: Crypt 306

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Schanke becomes the target of an avenging assassin Nick races the clock to save his partner

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki search for a cursed mulcher which is the murder weapon of choice for a gardeners assistant

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is in desperate need of character witnesses to testify on his behalf at his parking ticket trial

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys teach a wealthy couple the joys of simple living

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans 303
programme.desc: Hogans 303

programme.title: Hogans 329
programme.desc: Hogans 329

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale Molly and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton at bay while they arrange for an against-the-rules wedding for Christy and his fiancee - Lieutenant Gloria Winters

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Neeg is killed by a bacteria that is deadly to both Taelons and Humans If it spreads it might be disastrous A new racist group attacks a community center

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane combines his DNA with that of the deadliest plants he can find he unwittingly creates a monster

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Life gets very interesting for Will Tressa and Alec when Brads psychopathic brother turns up

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Whilst Koenig and Maya are exploring a planet called Luton which is lush in vegetation she picks a flower and he helps himself to some fruit As a result they are put on trial for murder by three talking trees the Judges of Luton The trial is by combat and the pair must face three aliens one with super-strength one which can render itself invisible and one which can teleport

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old man whos feeling down because he had to sell his shop and has nothing to do sees a young man the grandson of his friend get into a fight with someone with the young man killing the other man with his gun The young man runs away leaving the gun behind The old man picks it up and when some people show up after hearing the shots they assume that the old man killed him Mike is called in and he knows the man and Mike doesnt believe he killed him but arrests him The young man was delivering something for a bookie and the one with the gun was trying to steal it He tries to explain to the bookie what happened but the bookie doesnt believe him because there is something more important than money in the box He then goes to see the old man and tells him that unless he gets the box back the bookie will do stuff to him Mike lets the old man out and follows him to find out whats going on

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Barney are sent to investigate the case of a scientist who believes her dead husbands ghost is giving her orders on how to complete her important work

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is captured by Lt Gerard while traveling with a group of migrant workers During a violent wind storm Gerard is badly injured and Kimble has to convince the others to help him save Gerards life

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce pleads with Hercs former intergalactic commando leader General Zhest to help them fight Monster Minds The general is too afraid of Saw Boss and Jayce persuades Zhests son to join the fight Saw Boss poisons the water of the planet

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Saw Boss Audric is captured and one of many on board a slave ship Jayces root responds to Audrics and a disguised Jayce boards the slave ship in search of Audric Audrics friends mistakenly think Jayce is an enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Baseball World Captain N is playing baseball with Bo Jackson until Mother Brain kidnaps Princess Lana and warps Captain N Simon Duke Megaman Kid Icarus and Bo into the cellars How can they get out and save Lana

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill uses Halleys Comet to sneak past the Star Fortress which is guarding the Earth against Renegade attack

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill infiltrates the Guardian training academy planning to disrupt the graduation ceremonies
